brandHero.subtitle: BufferLine builds measurement and governance infrastructure for human-AI judgment delegation.
brandHero.description: Every interaction with AI involves a judgment shift. BufferLine provides the protocol, telemetry, and tools to make these shifts visible and governable.

stack.title: Three layers of judgment infrastructure
stack.description: JDVP measures. Thinkprint models. Meta Governance stabilizes. BufferLine frames it all.

jdvp.title: JDVP
jdvp.subtitle: Judgment Delegation Visibility Protocol
jdvp.description: Defines Judgment State Vectors and Delegation Vectors to capture how judgment holder, responsibility awareness, and decision latency shift over time.

thinkprint.title: Thinkprint
thinkprint.subtitle: Thinkprint playground
thinkprint.description: Extracts logic structure into playable Thinkprint modes you can remix, compare, and iterate on top of JDVP signals.

metagovernance.title: Meta Governance
metagovernance.subtitle: Systemic stabilization
metagovernance.description: Distributed feedback and stabilization layer for judgment governance across organizations and systems.
